positive: Minimalist stylized forest landscape silhouette, depicting a dense canopy of stylized trees with geometric leaves and elegant winding vines. The scene should have a clean, high-contrast black ink style against a solid background. Focus on sharp, negative-space silhouettes and repeating natural patterns (e.g., stylized moons, constellations, or abstract flora elements). Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centralized, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Color palette should be restricted to deep indigo and crisp white/negative space. Highly detailed line work, vector art aesthetic, perfect symmetry, print-ready, high resolution.
